title: Velvety Middle Eastern Avocado Stir-fry
description: This floral, velvety dish features raw vegetables in a plant-based-friendly meal-prep format, perfect for an energizing breakfast or snack.
instructions: Slice the avocado and bell pepper into thin strips. Thinly slice the zucchini and onion.
Mince the garlic finely, ensuring no big chunks remain.
Heat a pan over medium heat and add sesame oil or any neutral-flavored cooking oil to coat the bottom of the pan.
Add the minced garlic and sauté until fragrant but not browned, about 1 minute.
Add the zucchini and onion to the pan, stir-fry for about 3 minutes until they begin to soften.
Fold in the avocado and bell pepper, continue cooking for another 2-3 minutes until everything is heated through and lightly caramelized.
Remove from heat and serve immediately or store in an airtight container for meal prep.
